fields.name: repaymentId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this monthly repayment batch from Credit to Accounts

fields.name: batchDate
fields.description: The date on which this repayment batch was created or processed

fields.name: department
fields.description: Routing information identifying the originating and receiving departments

children.name: from
children.description: The department originating the repayment instruction

children.name: to
children.description: The department receiving the repayment instruction

fields.name: repayments
fields.description: Collection of individual loan repayment instructions to be processed via direct debit

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: The customer's bank account number from which the direct debit will be drawn

children.name: customerId
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer in the credit system

children.name: customerName
children.description: Full name of the customer as recorded in the credit system

children.name: loanId
children.description: Unique identifier for the loan being repaid

children.name: repaymentAmount
children.description: The amount to be collected via direct debit for this monthly repayment

children.name: currency
children.description: The currency code of the repayment amount

children.name: dueDate
children.description: The date on which the repayment is due to be collected

children.name: directDebitMandateId
children.description: Reference to the direct debit mandate authorizing this collection

children.name: repaymentStatus
children.description: The current status of the repayment instruction

children.name: repaymentType
children.description: The frequency classification of the repayment

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.description: The sum of all repayment amounts in this batch

fields.name: recordCount
fields.description: The number of individual repayment records included in this batch

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: The precise date and time when this batch was generated
